name: Gatekeeper Systems Inc.
description: Gatekeeper Systems Inc. is a leading provider of intelligent video surveillance and mobile data solutions designed for public transit, school buses, and first responder fleets. The company designs, manufactures, and markets high-definition video security systems, mobile data collectors, and artificial intelligence-enabled software that helps transit authorities and school districts protect passengers, monitor fleet operations, and optimize safety. Gatekeeper's solutions integrate high-resolution cameras, robust digital video recorders, and advanced analytics software to provide real-time situational awareness and evidence management.
